{#- Language switcher for a 2-build setup: - English at site root - Chinese at /zh/ Relies on: - `language` (Sphinx template context, e.g. "en" / "zh_CN") - `pagename` (docname, e.g. "index" / "advanced/faq") - `master_doc` (typically "index") -#} {%- set is_zh = (language or "").startswith("zh") -%} {%- set depth = pagename.count("/") -%} {%- set up = "../" * depth -%} {%- if is_zh -%} {%- set en_href = ("../" * (depth + 1)) + ("" if pagename == master_doc else (pagename + ".html")) -%}
EN / 中文
{%- else -%} {%- set zh_href = up + "zh/" + ("" if pagename == master_doc else (pagename + ".html")) -%}
EN / 中文
{%- endif -%}
